label: Special trees
description: Spawns special tree structures across the map based on pollution levels. Base schema shared by AnimaTrees, HarbingerTrees, and PoluxTrees.

treeDef.label: Tree def
treeDef.description: ThingDef of the special tree to spawn.

minProximityToSameTree.label: Min proximity to same tree
minProximityToSameTree.description: Minimum cell distance required between instances of this tree type.

pollutionNone.label: Pollution none
pollutionNone.description: Number of trees to spawn on tiles with no pollution.

pollutionLight.label: Pollution light
pollutionLight.description: Number of trees to spawn on tiles with light pollution.

pollutionModerate.label: Pollution moderate
pollutionModerate.description: Number of trees to spawn on tiles with moderate pollution.

pollutionExtreme.label: Pollution extreme
pollutionExtreme.description: Number of trees to spawn on tiles with extreme pollution.

createUsedRect.label: Create used rect
createUsedRect.description: When true, registers each tree's cell as a used rect during map generation.

requireUnfogged.label: Require unfogged
requireUnfogged.description: When true, trees may only spawn on already-revealed cells.

validators.label: Validators
validators.description: Placement validators that must all pass for a candidate tree cell to be accepted.
